title: Seyit Pack
description: Seyit Pack for CPVP and SMP
body:
# Seyit Pack

- Less Particles: Less particles for combat.
- Smaller Totem: Makes the Totem smaller.
- Simplified Armors: Makes armor textures more minimalistic.
- Minimal Fire: Shrinks the fire animation to the bottom of the screen, keeping your view clear.
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f70e447d5f9fba41fa86af69081789e03b3d7e9.png)
